title: Milk Tanker Overturns on I-40, Spilling into Creek
summary: A milk tanker overturned on I-40 in Burke County, causing a spill into Muddy Creek and road closure.
charlotte_impact: Accidents involving hazardous materials can cause environmental damage and disrupt transportation.

title: Critical Injury Reported in Northeast Charlotte Shooting
